solutions: Ensure the script is loaded: `<script type='module' src='...'></script>`
Check browser console for loading errors
Verify custom elements v1 support in your browser
Use CSS custom properties for theming (styles pierce Shadow DOM)
Check if you're using encapsulated selectors correctly
Verify CSS specificity
Use camelCase event handlers: `onIfxClick` not `onclick`
Ensure you're using the React wrapper components
Check that the wrapper is properly importing the core component
Wrap component usage in `ngAfterViewInit`
Use `ChangeDetectionStrategy.OnPush`
Run outside Angular zone when appropriate
Ensure v-model is properly configured
Check if the component emits the correct events for v-model
Use client-only rendering for web components
Implement proper SSR guards
Consider using framework-specific lazy loading
Use loading states appropriately
Consider skeleton loaders during hydration
Use lazy loading - the library supports tree-shaking and lazy loading of individual components
Use visibility hiding until component is defined
